author: Hoerl & Kennard (1970)
title: Ridge Regression: Biased Estimation for Nonorthogonal Problems
why: Awal mula regularisasi: nambah bias dikit malah bikin estimasi lebih stabil

author: Tibshirani (1996)
title: Regression Shrinkage and Selection via the Lasso
why: L1 penalty yang mendorong koefisien jadi nol — seleksi fitur otomatis

author: Breiman (1996)
title: Bagging Predictors
why: Bootstrap + averaging buat nurunin variance, fondasi semua ensemble

author: Breiman (2001)
title: Random Forests
why: Banyak pohon acak digabung, benchmark klasik yang wajib bisa direplikasi

author: Domingos & Pazzani (1997)
title: On the Optimality of the Simple Bayesian Classifier under Zero-One Loss
why: Kenapa Naive Bayes tetap jago walau asumsi independensinya ngawur

author: Chawla et al. (2002)
title: SMOTE: Synthetic Minority Over-sampling Technique
why: Bikin sampel sintetis kelas minoritas biar data imbalance ga bias

author: Zou & Hastie (2005)
title: Regularization and Variable Selection via the Elastic Net
why: Gabung ridge + lasso, oke buat fitur banyak yang saling korelasi

author: Guyon & Elisseeff (2003)
title: An Introduction to Variable and Feature Selection
why: Panduan lengkap milih fitur relevan, wajib baca sebelum modeling

author: Wolpert (1992)
title: Stacked Generalization
why: Numpuk model pakai meta-learner, ide dasar stacking

author: Ester et al. (1996)
title: A Density-Based Algorithm for Discovering Clusters in Large Spatial Databases with Noise
why: DBSCAN: clustering berbasis densitas, nemu cluster bentuk aneh + noise

author: Platt (1999)
title: Probabilistic Outputs for Support Vector Machines and Comparisons to Regularized Likelihood Methods
why: Ubah skor SVM jadi probabilitas kalibrasi lewat sigmoid fitting

author: Niculescu-Mizil & Caruana (2005)
title: Predicting Good Probabilities With Supervised Learning
why: Bandingin metode kalibrasi probabilitas antar model supervised

author: Freund & Schapire (1997)
title: A Decision-Theoretic Generalization of On-Line Learning and an Application to Boosting
why: AdaBoost: gabung weak learner jadi kuat, teori + algoritma boosting

author: Boser, Guyon & Vapnik (1992)
title: A Training Algorithm for Optimal Margin Classifiers
why: Asal usul kernel trick + margin maksimum, cikal bakal SVM

author: Cortes & Vapnik (1995)
title: Support-Vector Networks
why: Paper SVM resmi: soft margin + kernel buat klasifikasi non-linear

author: Bottou (2010)
title: Large-Scale Machine Learning with Stochastic Gradient Descent
why: Kenapa SGD menang di data gede — trade-off optimasi vs generalisasi

author: Ruder (2016)
title: An Overview of Gradient Descent Optimization Algorithms
why: Rangkuman rapi semua varian gradient descent (momentum, Adam, dll)

author: Sutskever et al. (2013)
title: On the Importance of Initialization and Momentum in Deep Learning
why: Peran momentum + inisialisasi biar training net dalam jalan

author: Kingma & Ba (2014)
title: Adam: A Method for Stochastic Optimization
why: Optimizer paling laku: adaptif per-parameter, momentum + RMSprop

author: Friedman (2001)
title: Greedy Function Approximation: A Gradient Boosting Machine
why: Boosting sebagai gradient descent di function space, mesin GBM

author: Friedman, Hastie & Tibshirani (2000)
title: Additive Logistic Regression: A Statistical View of Boosting
why: Pandangan statistik boosting — jembatan menuju gradient boosting

author: Reynolds (2009)
title: Gaussian Mixture Models
why: Model campuran Gaussian dilatih pakai EM — dasar clustering probabilistik

author: Ng, Jordan & Weiss (2002)
title: On Spectral Clustering: Analysis and an Algorithm
why: Clustering pakai eigenvector matriks similarity, ampuh buat data ga cembung

author: Evgeniou, Pontil & Poggio (2000)
title: Regularization Networks and Support Vector Machines
why: Teori: RBF, regularisasi, dan SVM ternyata satu kerangka

author: von Luxburg (2007)
title: A Tutorial on Spectral Clustering
why: Tutorial mendalam spectral clustering + teori graph Laplacian
